title: Eurowrap Gingerbread 8 Sheet Tissue Paper – 4 Sheets Green & 4 Sheets Gingerbread Print – 50 x 70 cm FSC Mix – Christmas Wrapping & Craft
features: 8 SHEETS OF FESTIVE TISSUE – Includes 4 plain green sheets and 4 printed gingerbread-themed sheets
LARGE SIZE – 50 x 70 cm sheets ideal for wrapping, lining hampers or Christmas craft projects
FSC MIX PAPER – Made from 17gsm eco-friendly paper from responsibly sourced forests
FUN CHRISTMAS DESIGN – Gingerbread men, trees, candy canes and festive biscuits in bright colours
PERFECT FOR GIFT WRAPPING – Adds a fun and cheerful finishing touch to presents and hampers
description: Bring sweet festive charm to your gift wrapping with the Eurowrap Gingerbread 8 Sheet Tissue Paper. This pack contains four plain green sheets and four printed sheets bursting with gingerbread men, Christmas trees, baubles, stars, candy canes and festive biscuits. Each sheet measures 50 x 70 cm, made from lightweight 17gsm FSC Mix paper for an eco-conscious choice. Perfect for wrapping delicate gifts, lining hampers, or adding a decorative touch to Christmas crafts. The paper is neatly packaged with a die-cut window for easy selection and an easy-peel lip seal for convenience.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Gift Wrapping, Craft Projects, Art Projects
